findings.detail: merlin_store.gd:199 initializes all 5 factions at FACTION_SCORE_START=20, merlin_save_system.gd:148 clamps on load ✅

arc_unlocked always used rep_value>=threshold regardless of arc_condition_type. Biomes with runs_in_biome/fins_vues/oghams_owned were always unlocked from run 1 (rep_value=20>=3/5/2). FIXED: arc_condition_type dispatch added at lines 95-104.

save_data.get('biome_history',...) — key 'biome_history' never exists (should be 'biome_runs'). previous_runs always 0, explored_detours always []. FIXED: now uses biome_runs_map.get(biome_id, 0) + passes fins_vues + oghams_owned.
var expected := int(VALID_CODES[code]) — := with CONST dict indexing violates code style. FIXED: explicit type annotation.

tasks_generated.title: Implement get_save_data() in MerlinStore
tasks_generated.description: merlin_game_controller.gd:285 calls store.get_save_data() but the method doesn't exist in MerlinStore. save_data stays as {} fallback. Need to implement func get_save_data() -> Dictionary in merlin_store.gd that returns save_system.load_profile().

tasks_generated.title: Implement IN_GAME_PERIODS faction bonus in card resolution
tasks_generated.description: merlin_constants.gd:546-549 defines IN_GAME_PERIODS (aube/jour/crepuscule/nuit) each with faction bonuses +10%/+15%. No code applies these bonuses at card resolution time. Need to check current card index vs period ranges and apply rep multiplier in _apply_faction_reputation.

tasks_generated.title: Test faction ending unlock (threshold 80) triggers correct narrative ending
tasks_generated.description: Verify that when any faction reaches >=80 in meta.faction_rep, the corresponding ending route is offered at run end. Check MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings() is called in run end flow.

tasks_generated.title: Test faction content unlock (threshold 50) gates special cards
tasks_generated.description: Verify that cards with faction_required >= 50 threshold are only offered when player has corresponding faction_rep >= 50. Check card filtering in merlin_card_system.gd.

tasks_generated.title: Regression test: arc_condition_type evaluation correctness
tasks_generated.description: After S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL fix: CHK-1: runs_in_biome arc locked on run 0, unlocked on run 3+. CHK-2: fins_vues arc locked at fins_vues=0, unlocked at 5. CHK-3: oghams_owned arc locked at 1 ogham, unlocked at 2. CHK-4: faction_rep arc still works correctly. CHK-5: biome_runs_map key correct in _build_context.

patterns_learned.pattern: Save data keys must exactly match _get_default_profile() keys — 'biome_history' != 'biome_runs' caused previous_runs=0 always
arc_condition_type dispatch: when evaluating arc unlock, always check arc_condition_type first, then read the correct context key (faction_rep/previous_runs/fins_vues/oghams_owned)
